response:
Thank you for reaching out regarding your test score. I understand this is frustrating, but HackerRank is unable to review individual test answers, modify scores, or intervene in a company's hiring decision.

According to our Manual for Fair Hiring, HackerRank assessments are designed to be highly job-related, reliable, and fair to all test-takers. The scoring is automated and consistently applied to all candidates. We do not have the ability to manually increase scores or override a recruiter's decision.

Additionally, HackerRank's platform provides your test results to the recruiting company for their own evaluation. Any decisions about advancing candidates to the next round are entirely at the discretion of the company, not HackerRank.

If you believe there was a technical issue with the test itself, I would recommend reaching out to the recruiter directly to discuss your concerns. Unfortunately, HackerRank does not serve as a mediator in hiring decisions.
justification: The ticket asks HackerRank to review answers, increase scores, and override the recruiter's rejection. None of these actions are supported by the provided context. The Manual for Fair Hiring (Context 3) discusses that assessments are fair and reliable, but does not describe any score review or adjustment process. No context provides a mechanism for disputing scores or requesting manual intervention. The response explains HackerRank's limitations based on available information.

We're sorry to hear that your mock interviews stopped working mid-session. We understand this must be frustrating.

Regarding your refund request, per HackerRank's refund policy: "If you accidentally make a purchase or are not satisfied with your mock interview, contact help@hackerrank.com. The support team will promptly review your request." Since this involves a billing/refund inquiry that requires a financial review, I've escalated your ticket to the appropriate team who can investigate the technical issue and handle your refund request.

In the meantime, you can also view your previous interview attempts by going to the **Prepare** tab, clicking **Take Interview** under the relevant interview type (Coding, Behavioral, or System Design), and selecting **View Previous Interviews**.
justification: The user reports a bug (mock interviews stopping mid-session) and requests a refund. The refund policy from Context 1 directs users to contact help@hackerrank.com for refund reviews, which implies this needs a specialized team (billing/support) beyond general troubleshooting. The technical bug aspect also needs investigation. Therefore, escalation is appropriate as neither the technical bug fix nor the refund processing can be fully addressed with the provided context alone.
